description: Lyra MAP-AC2200 tri-band WiFi mesh node (IPQ4019 + QCA9886)

hardware.wifi: Tri-band: IPQ4019 2.4GHz b/g/n 2x2 (ch1-11) + IPQ4019 5GHz a/n/ac 2x2 (ch36-64) + QCA9886 5GHz a/n/ac (ch100-165)
hardware.led: RGB LED via TI LP5523 (9-channel controller)

signatures.stock_dhcp_client: Device sends DHCP Discover from WAN port - if you see this, you're on the wrong port

stock-ssh-mtd.description: Two-stage flash via stock firmware SSH: (1) SCP initramfs.itb to /tmp/, mtd-unlock + mtd-write to linux partition, reboot into OpenWrt initramfs; (2) SCP sysupgrade.bin to /tmp/, sysupgrade -n. Stock firmware SSH uses same credentials as web UI. Port next to power connector = LAN, other = WAN.
stock-ssh-mtd.led_pattern_boot: LED breathes multiple colors, then blinks blue, then steady blue when ready
stock-ssh-mtd.reset_instructions: Factory reset: hold reset button 5 seconds until orange flashing, then release. Do NOT hold 10+ seconds (enters rescue mode). On factory default (white LED), SSH is enabled automatically via CVE chain (CVE-2021-32030 null-byte auth bypass + CVE-2018-5999 apply.cgi). No wizard needed. Works from macOS or OpenWrt (router-to-router). WiFi flash: use --wifi flag from OpenWrt host to auto-scan for ASUS_* SSID and flash wirelessly (no ethernet cable needed). PORT WARNING: Stock LAN port varies by hardware batch — try both ports if device not found. After initramfs flash, cable MUST be on middle port (LAN in OpenWrt).

wifi-sta-flash.description: WiFi STA flash from OpenWrt host: scan for ASUS_* SSID (open/no encryption on 2.4GHz), connect STA interface, CVE chain SSH enable over WiFi, SCP initramfs, mtd-write. No ethernet cable needed. Requires OpenWrt host with 2.4GHz STA-capable radio.

stock-ssh-mtd-batch1.notes: Batch 1. 2 units tested. OEM wizard via Playwright (unit 1) and curl-based SSH enable (unit 2). SCP requires -O flag. Port next to power = LAN in stock firmware.

stock-ssh-mtd-batch2.notes: Batch 2. 2 units tested. REVERSED port assignments: stock LAN on far port, stock WAN on middle port. OpenWrt LAN still middle port. Curl-based SSH enable. SCP with long filenames fails silently — use short names.

port_variability.note: Stock firmware port assignments vary by hardware batch. OpenWrt always uses middle port (closest to power) as LAN.
port_variability.discovery_method: Try both ports. Listen for STP/SSDP broadcasts with tcpdump. The port that sends traffic is the stock LAN port.
